compiled_state.title: Docs sweep: precedence/discovery/keys (README/CLAUDE.md/docs)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Update README, CLAUDE.md, and docs/ to document the TOML config, precedence, discovery, and the key set; remove references to the bespoke flat format.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] README/CLAUDE.md/docs describe TOML config + precedence + discovery + keys
- [ ] No stale references to the bespoke flat .rebar/config.conf format (except the back-compat note)
- [ ] Full suite green
Blocked by loader/route/show-config tasks.

comments.body: DONE (config-loop, commit 4fe467f7). Docs sweep for the final config surface. AC1 (README/CLAUDE.md/docs describe TOML config + precedence + discovery + keys): docs/config.md (the ADR+reference) now has an accurate key inventory split into config-FILE-backed keys (verify/ticket/compact/sync/mcp/scratch, read via load_config) vs advanced ENV-only tunables (reconciler.*/jira.* raw env; llm.* via LLMConfig) with the config-file-wiring gap tracked by 0ac6; added macOS ~/.config note + non-absolute XDG ignore, REBAR_CONFIG_UNKNOWN_KEYS=error cutover, the full deprecation-alias + removed-var list, and the rebar -c flag. README ## Configuration rewritten TOML-first (discovery, precedence rebar -c/CLI>env>project>user>default, rebar config, pointer to docs/config.md). AC2 (no stale flat-format refs except back-compat): the README flat-format-as-primary section is replaced; .rebar/config.conf appears only as back-compat notes; old env names (REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE, REBAR_PUSH) now shown only as deprecated aliases in README+CLAUDE.md; removed vars listed as removed. AC3 (full suite green): 1985 passed, 9 skipped. Subagent docs-accuracy review: ACCURATE vs implementation (every key/alias/default cross-checked against src); 1 LOW completeness gap (ticket_clarity.threshold legacy-flat-only) documented + folded into 0ac6. Discovered enhancement follow-ups (beyond the epic ACs): cdd4 (CLI layer wiring — DONE) + 0ac6 (config-file routing for the advanced tunables + ticket_clarity — OPEN).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

file_impact.reason: accurate key inventory (file vs env-only) + macOS/XDG/strict/aliases/removed
TOML-first Configuration section + canonical env names
